message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Adding validate_nesting param to Context (core.py) + shell_completion.py updates to disable validation during completion. Both files needed for this feature.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
note: I'm fixing resource leak in shell completion: wrap _resolve_context's make_context calls in 'with' statements so contexts are properly closed. Need to touch core.py (Context.__exit__ / close, or Context as context manager support) and shell_completion.py (_resolve_context). What files do you need?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/click/core.py
your_files: src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Our features overlap on both files. Let's split by file instead: I take core.py (adding validate_nesting param to Context, child-context tracking in _make_sub_context, validation in close()/__exit__ raising RuntimeError on unclosed children). You take shell_completion.py (your with-statement fix for resource leaks). One thing I need from you: in shell_completion.py, everywhere you construct a Context (e.g. in _resolve_context / make_context calls), please pass validate_nesting=False explicitly so completion generation never trips the new validation. I'll make sure Context accepts that kwarg. Sound good?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/click/shell_completion.py
your_files: src/click/core.py
note: Investigated: Context already supports the with-statement protocol (__enter__/__exit__/close via _exit_stack) in core.py, so my fix (wrap the 3 make_context() calls in _resolve_context with 'with' blocks) needs ZERO core.py changes. I'll only touch shell_completion.py's _resolve_context function. Your validate_nesting param change owns core.py fully. We still both touch shell_completion.py though (you need to pass validate_nesting into the same make_context calls I'm wrapping) - suggest: I push my change first (just wrapping calls in 'with', not changing call args/kwargs), then you rebase/merge on top and add your validate_nesting kwarg into the same calls. I'll ping you when pushed. OK with this sequencing?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/click/core.py
your_files: src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Agreed. I own core.py fully. You own shell_completion.py (with-statement wrapping). After you push, I'll merge and layer validate_nesting=False into the wrapped make_context calls you touch. Ping me when pushed.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/click/shell_completion.py
your_files: src/click/core.py
note: Agreed. I own shell_completion.py, you own core.py. I'll pass validate_nesting=False in the make_context calls inside _resolve_context in shell_completion.py so your new validation never trips during completion. Starting implementation now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/core.py
note: core.py implementation complete: added validate_nesting param to Context, tracking via _open_child_contexts, inheritance + registration in _make_sub_context, RuntimeError validation in close(). Pushed to agent2 branch. Let me know when shell_completion.py is ready so I can merge.
